title: The Scars of the Partner
content: 'Simon Marlow,' Miller whispers, leaning in close. 'Vane's old photographer. Vane ruined him a year ago over some faked photos. Marlow lost everything.'||'We did a sweep of his flat. Found a spare key to Vane's office hidden under his floorboards. Then the lab found it: blood on the keys of Vane's old mechanical typewriter. It matched Marlow's DNA profile perfectly.'||'I even found a draft of a death threat in his trash. Marlow had the motive and the means. He's the perfect fit, Detective. I just couldn't make it stick legally... yet. The DA is being cautious. But he's your killer. I'm sure of it.'||📝 FILES UPDATED: Spare Key, DNA Report, and Threatening Letter added.

choices.text: Leave the precinct and verify the lead.
